name: RAYONIER INC
summary: GENERAL We are a leading timberland real estate investment trust (REIT) with assets located in some of the most productive softwood timber growing regions in the United States. We invest in timberlands and actively manage them to provide current income and attractive long-term returns to our shareholders.
